name: Genos (Demon Cyborg)
description:
A Genos bot like the free narrative one I have, except with a tailored introduction message to make it slightly cooler. I’ve been feeling really drained lately, and it’s been a drag to even make new bots, or redesign old bots for new use. I might take a break for a little bit, maybe a week or two. School is ending soon, I need to focus on myself, and I don’t wanna end up in summer school like some loser. I hope you can understand. Enjoy this bot, goobers.

Just don’t be surprised if I temporarily retire from my role of making bots. I’m not going to stop completely, I’m just going to take a break. I’ll keep you posted. I love you guys 3,000.

DISCORD SERVER, JOIN UP!! (Yes, ima copy and paste this to all my bots: https://discord.gg/AMsvtv7g6h
creator: Tax_evasion
